title: DDS COVID Telework and Climate-Survey Source Chain
description: Human-readable provenance chain linking each DDS COVID telework and climate-survey data point to stored source records, public URLs, and remaining MassAbility PRR targets. Separates public evidence from unresolved questions about five-day virtual work, the later three-day schedule transition, and any DDS-specific or DDS-inclusive climate/culture survey report.
geographic_coverage: Massachusetts DDS focus; SSA national/DDS context; MRC/MassAbility context

source.title: Provenance chain assembled from stored source records, public URLs, and MassAbility PRR targets

update_cadence: As needed; update when blocked public records are browser-saved or MassAbility produces responsive records.
notes: Computed provenance file. Full local records are stored for the SSA OIG DDS pandemic PDF and the Massachusetts Commission on LGBTQ Youth FY2018 recommendations PDF. Direct local download attempts for the SSA press release, SSA testimony, and Mass.gov SRC minutes were blocked by publisher access controls; public URLs remain in the chain and should be browser-saved or replaced by PRR-produced records.
